prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This toolkit is relevant to England as it outlines strategies for improving fire safety in residential buildings, with specific examples from English local councils and housing providers. The mention of regulations and safety measures directly relates to the governance and fire safety protocols in England.
